name: Carrot and Yogurt Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp finely chopped hot fresh red/green pepper or 1/2 tsp crushed hot red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the carrot into coarse shreds using a hand grater or food processor. There should be about 1 cup of shredded carrots.
2. Place the carrot shreds in boiling water and cook for approximately 30 seconds. Drain well before serving.
3. Combine the yogurt, carrot shreds, and remaining ingredients in a bowl. Serve chilled.
